creator: anders@fix.no
text:
Update the ports to snapshot 0104192245. Add some corrected+more info
about PAM (particularly session management), it seems to have confused
some people.

For some info about why we are tracking snapshots at the moment, see
ftp://ftp.cac.washington.edu/imap/imap-README.

Fix: 

http://anders.fix.no/ports/archives/imap-uw_010424.diffs
http://anders.fix.no/ports/archives/cclient_010424.diffs
